sanskrit:
न प्रहृष्येत्प्रियं प्राप्य नोद्विजेत्प्राप्य चाप्रियम्।
स्थिरबुद्धिरसंमूढो ब्रह्मविद्ब्रह्मणि स्थितः॥
transliteration:
na prahṛṣyet priyaṃ prāpya nodvijet prāpya cāpriyam |
sthirabuddhir asammūḍho brahmavid brahmaṇi sthitaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Not he rejoices pleasant upon gaining, not he is agitated upon gaining unpleasant; steady-minded, undeluded, Brahman-knowing, in Brahman established.
contextual_meaning: A psychologically integrated person remains affect-neutral toward gains and losses, anchored in a stable self-concept beyond egoic fluctuations.
psychological_state: Stable self-identity; non-reactive to reward or threat; secure attachment to the transcendent Self.
trigger_scenario: Stock-market crash wipes out savings; you notice neither panic nor euphoria on recovery—just calm reallocation.
anchor_text: Stay calm in gain or loss, rooted in your unchanging self.
